mainEntity.name: What types of AI solutions does TimeSquare LLC build?

acceptedAnswer.text: We specialize in LLM integrations (ChatGPT, GPT-4), natural language processing, computer vision, chatbot development, and machine learning models like churn prediction.

mainEntity.name: How long does a typical AI integration project take?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most projects range from 4-12 weeks depending on complexity. A chatbot or API integration might take 4-6 weeks, while a full-stack platform typically takes 8-12 weeks.

mainEntity.name: Does TimeSquare LLC work with businesses outside the UK?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, we serve clients across the UK, US, and Middle East with timezone-flexible collaboration.

mainEntity.name: How much does an AI integration project cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: Project costs vary. A focused AI integration starts from GBP 5,000, while full-stack platforms range from GBP 15,000-50,000+. We provide detailed quotes after a free consultation.
